name: Cow face (P324/M142) → aa
rationale: U+serif = cow face. Onomatopoeia 'aa' from 'maa'. Tholkaappiyam confirms.

name: Tally-4 → na (from numeral nanku)
rationale: Tamil numeral 'nanku' (four) → phoneme 'na'. Bridges missing vowel-u sounds.

name: Y-sign (P385/M162) → ney
rationale: Consistent dairy context with unicorn motif. Seals 1076, 2949, 2950.

name: E-vowel modifier: sa → si
rationale: Modifier has form but no independent sound. Alters preceding consonant. Tamizi/Tamil system.

name: Suffix modifier: adds -am/-an/-al/-ar
rationale: Suffix modifier adds Tamil grammatical endings. Not shown in concordance.

name: Signs 10+12 → sign 15 (aakaavva)
rationale: Seal 3246 documents full compound integration. Linear→integrated writing progression.

name: Unicorn → Market Common jurisdiction
rationale: 60% of iconographic seals. Consistently dairy/commercial/governance content.

name: Elephant → Elephant Street
rationale: Seals 2648 (ghee shed) and 2127 (sesame oil) both elephant motif.

name: No motif → city-wide ordinance
rationale: Motifless seals: curfew (4440), guild laws (4371), certifications (4284), elder care (1425).

name: Gharial → Riverine district
rationale: Seal 2864 gharial motif = same law as 2444 unicorn, different location.
